_comment: FareBoost parser overrides. Every key is optional; anything absent, empty or malformed falls back to the value compiled into the app. Edits go live within 30 minutes, with no Play release and no reinstall.
_autoaccept_comment: A platform may run LIVE only once its audit log shows the tap landing correctly on real offers. Flip to true to graduate one - no rebuild needed. Lyft: proven 2026-07-19 plus a live tap on record. Uber: 10 clean shadow lines but no gesture has ever executed (canPerformGestures was missing until 2026-07-22). Hopp: no audit entry of any kind.
